member.name: T:ITS.TrackableEntities.EF.Core.Constants
member.summary: File containing constants.

member.name: T:ITS.TrackableEntities.EF.Core.Constants.ExceptionMessages
member.summary: Exception messages.

member.name: F:ITS.TrackableEntities.EF.Core.Constants.ExceptionMessages.DeletedWithAddedChildren
member.summary: Exception message for deleted with children.

member.name: F:ITS.TrackableEntities.EF.Core.Constants.ExceptionMessages.RelationshipNotDetermined
member.summary: Exception message for relationship not determined.

member.name: T:ITS.TrackableEntities.EF.Core.DbContextExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for DbContext to persist trackable entities.

member.name: M:ITS.TrackableEntities.EF.Core.DbContextExtensions.ApplyChanges(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContext,ITS.TrackableEntities.Common.Core.ITrackable)
member.summary: Update entity state on DbContext for an object graph.
member.param: Used to query and save changes to a database
Object that implements ITrackable

member.name: M:ITS.TrackableEntities.EF.Core.DbContextExtensions.ApplyChanges(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContext,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{ITS.TrackableEntities.Common.Core.ITrackable})
member.summary: Update entity state on DbContext for more than one object graph.
member.param: Used to query and save changes to a database
Objects that implement ITrackable

member.name: M:ITS.TrackableEntities.EF.Core.DbContextExtensions.DetachEntities(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContext,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{ITS.TrackableEntities.Common.Core.ITrackable})
member.summary: Set entity state to Detached for entities in more than one object graph.
member.param: Used to query and save changes to a database
Objects that implement ITrackable

member.name: M:ITS.TrackableEntities.EF.Core.DbContextExtensions.DetachEntities(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContext,ITS.TrackableEntities.Common.Core.ITrackable)
member.summary: Set entity state to Detached for entities in an object graph.
member.param: Used to query and save changes to a database
Object that implements ITrackable

member.name: M:ITS.TrackableEntities.EF.Core.DbContextExtensions.LoadRelatedEntities(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContext,ITS.TrackableEntities.Common.Core.ITrackable)
member.summary: Traverse an object graph to populate null reference properties.
member.param: Used to query and save changes to a database
Object that implements ITrackable

member.name: M:ITS.TrackableEntities.EF.Core.DbContextExtensions.LoadRelatedEntities(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContext,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{ITS.TrackableEntities.Common.Core.ITrackable})
member.summary: Traverse more than one object graph to populate null reference properties.
member.param: Used to query and save changes to a database
Objects that implement ITrackable

member.name: M:ITS.TrackableEntities.EF.Core.DbContextExtensions.LoadRelatedEntitiesAsync(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContext,ITS.TrackableEntities.Common.Core.ITrackable)
member.summary: Traverse an object graph asynchronously to populate null reference properties.
member.param: Used to query and save changes to a database
Object that implements ITrackable

member.name: M:ITS.TrackableEntities.EF.Core.DbContextExtensions.LoadRelatedEntitiesAsync(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContext,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{ITS.TrackableEntities.Common.Core.ITrackable})
member.summary: Traverse more than one object graph asynchronously to populate null reference properties.
member.param: Used to query and save changes to a database
Objects that implement ITrackable

member.name: M:ITS.TrackableEntities.EF.Core.DbContextExtensions.AcceptChanges(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContext,ITS.TrackableEntities.Common.Core.ITrackable)
member.summary: Traverse an object graph to set TrackingState to Unchanged.
member.param: Used to query and save changes to a database
Object that implements ITrackable

member.name: M:ITS.TrackableEntities.EF.Core.DbContextExtensions.AcceptChanges(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContext,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{ITS.TrackableEntities.Common.Core.ITrackable})
member.summary: Traverse more than one object graph to set TrackingState to Unchanged.
member.param: Used to query and save changes to a database
Objects that implement ITrackable

member.name: T:ITS.TrackableEntities.EF.Core.DbContextExtensionsInternal
member.summary: Internal extension methods for trackable entities.

member.name: M:ITS.TrackableEntities.EF.Core.DbContextExtensionsInternal.TraverseGraph(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContext,System.Object,System.Action{Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.ChangeTracking.EntityEntryGraphNode})
member.summary: Traverse an object graph executing a callback on each node.
member.param: Used to query and save changes to a database
Object that implements ITrackable
Callback executed on each node in the object graph

member.name: M:ITS.TrackableEntities.EF.Core.DbContextExtensionsInternal.TraverseGraphAsync(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContext,System.Object,System.Func{Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.ChangeTracking.EntityEntryGraphNode,System.Threading.Tasks.Task})
member.summary: Traverse an object graph asynchronously executing a callback on each node.
member.param: Used to query and save changes to a database
Object that implements ITrackable
Async callback executed on each node in the object graph

member.name: T:ITS.TrackableEntities.EF.Core.NavigationExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for INavigation.

member.name: M:ITS.TrackableEntities.EF.Core.NavigationExtensions.GetRelationshipType(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.INavigation)
member.summary: Infer relationship type from an INavigation.
member.param: Navigation property which can be used to navigate a relationship.
member.returns: Type of relationship between entities; null if INavigation is null.

member.name: T:ITS.TrackableEntities.EF.Core.RelationshipType
member.summary: Type of relationship between entities.

member.name: F:ITS.TrackableEntities.EF.Core.RelationshipType.ManyToOne
member.summary: Many to one relationship.

member.name: F:ITS.TrackableEntities.EF.Core.RelationshipType.OneToOne
member.summary: One to one relationship.

member.name: F:ITS.TrackableEntities.EF.Core.RelationshipType.ManyToMany
member.summary: Many to many relationship.

member.name: F:ITS.TrackableEntities.EF.Core.RelationshipType.OneToMany
member.summary: One to many relationship.

member.name: T:ITS.TrackableEntities.EF.Core.TrackableExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for classes implementing ITrackable.

member.name: M:ITS.TrackableEntities.EF.Core.TrackableExtensions.ToEntityState(ITS.TrackableEntities.Common.Core.TrackingState)
member.summary: Convert TrackingState to EntityState.
member.param: Trackable entity state

member.name: M:ITS.TrackableEntities.EF.Core.TrackableExtensions.ToTrackingState(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.EntityState)
member.summary: Convert EntityState to TrackingState.
member.param: EF entity state
